description_long: This is a classic red, cylindrical mailbox mounted on a single wooden post. The mailbox features a curved top and flat sides, with a front-facing door that has a rectangular mail slot and a small handle for opening. A red flag is attached to the right side, which can be raised to indicate outgoing mail. The mailbox body is made of metal, with visible seams and rivets for structural support. The wooden post is vertically oriented and has a natural wood grain texture. The mailbox is designed for outdoor use, typically found along streets or at the end of driveways in residential neighborhoods.
description: A red, cylindrical metal mailbox with a front door, side flag, and mounted on a wooden post. It features a mail slot and is designed for outdoor urban or suburban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red flag raised and the wooden post supporting the mailbox.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the curved back of the mailbox and the top of the wooden post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the flag visible on the far side and the mailbox door on the right.
description_view_3: Front view showing the mail slot, door, and the opening for mail insertion.
